description: The IcoSphereMeshGizmo component is a Gizmo component used to edit ico sphere mesh properties via the dev tool.

fields._target: The ico sphere mesh we are editing and targeting.
fields._sphereGizmo: The Sphere gizmo to use as a way of editing ``_target``.

usage: Not used directly by the user. is generated by the dev tip when selecting the option for editing an IcoSphereMesh on a selected slot.
